title: just dropped 5 ETH for bug bounty rewards on my OSS project. your contributions r making a real diff

audit.reason: The code provided is a basic implementation of a safe transfer contract with reentrancy protection. The tests included cover basic deposit and withdrawal functionalities, but could be expanded for more comprehensive coverage.
audit.improvements: Consider adding more test cases to cover edge cases, such as withdrawing zero amount, transferring to zero address, and handling large values to test gas costs. Additionally, you might want to add a fallback function to handle unexpected Ether transfers.
